state.output:
<file>
00001| import { createConfig as createPrivyConfig } from '@privy-io/wagmi'
00002| import { createConfig as createWagmiConfig } from 'wagmi'
00003| import { http } from 'wagmi'
00004| import { injected } from 'wagmi/connectors'
00005| import { 
00006|   supportedChains, 
00007|   base, 
00008|   baseSepolia, 
00009|   getRpcUrl, 
00010|   bsc, 
00011|   arbitrum, 
00012|   berachain, 
00013|   avalanche, 
00014|   hyperliquid, 
00015|   polygon, 
00016|   optimism, 
00017|   linea, 
00018|   mantle, 
00019|   unichain, 
00020|   shape, 
00021|   scroll, 
00022|   ethereum,
00023|   plume
00024| } from './chains'
00025| import { config } from '../../config'
00026| 
00027| const transports = {
00028|   [base.id]: http(getRpcUrl(base.id)),
00029|   [baseSepolia.id]: http(getRpcUrl(baseSepolia.id)),
00030|   [ethereum.id]: http(getRpcUrl(ethereum.id)),
00031|   [bsc.id]: http(getRpcUrl(bsc.id)),
00032|   [arbitrum.id]: http(getRpcUrl(arbitrum.id)),
00033|   [berachain.id]: http(getRpcUrl(berachain.id)),
00034|   [avalanche.id]: http(getRpcUrl(avalanche.id)),
00035|   [hyperliquid.id]: http(getRpcUrl(hyperliquid.id)),
00036|   [polygon.id]: http(getRpcUrl(polygon.id)),
00037|   [optimism.id]: http(getRpcUrl(optimism.id)),
00038|   [linea.id]: http(getRpcUrl(linea.id)),
00039|   [scroll.id]: http(getRpcUrl(scroll.id)),
00040|   [mantle.id]: http(getRpcUrl(mantle.id)),
00041|   [unichain.id]: http(getRpcUrl(unichain.id)),
00042|   [shape.id]: http(getRpcUrl(shape.id)),
00043|   [plume.id]: http(getRpcUrl(plume.id)),
00044| }
00045| 
00046| // Dynamically choose config: Privy when available, otherwise InjectedConnector fallback
00047| export const wagmiConfig = config.privy.appId && config.privy.clientId
00048|   ? createPrivyConfig({
00049|       chains: supportedChains,
00050|       transports,
00051|     })
00052|   : createWagmiConfig({
00053|       chains: supportedChains,
00054|       connectors: [injected()],
00055|       transports,
00056|     })
00057| 
00058| export { 
00059|   supportedChains, 
00060|   base, 
00061|   baseSepolia, 
00062|   bsc, 
00063|   arbitrum, 
00064|   berachain, 
00065|   avalanche, 
00066|   hyperliquid, 
00067|   polygon, 
00068|   optimism, 
00069|   linea, 
00070|   mantle, 
00071|   unichain, 
00072|   shape, 
00073|   scroll,
00074|   ethereum,
00075|   plume
00076| } 
</file>
